input_roles.character_image: Locks original character appearance, makeup, face, hair, skin tone, body proportion, pose and composition.
input_roles.costume_reference_image: Provides 服装样式和版型, garment cut, fabric, color, accessories and layers.

change_scope: replace full costume with costume_reference_image while preserving 服装样式和版型 from the costume reference
fit clothing naturally to body shape with physical folds, drape, occlusion and motion tension
critical_requirements: Fully restore 服装样式和版型, garment cut, fabric, color, decoration, buttons, embroidery, belt, accessories and layers from costume_reference_image.
Preserve original character appearance and makeup unchanged.
Do not copy the model face or body from costume_reference_image.
Do not change background unless explicitly requested.
negative_constraints: do not change original character appearance, makeup, face, hair, body proportion or pose
do not copy face or body from costume reference
do not change background unless requested
do not lose key costume style, cut, decoration or layers
do not change 服装样式和版型 from costume_reference_image

prompt_assembly.final_prompt_template: Preserve the original character appearance and makeup from character_image unchanged, and replace only the clothing with the costume from costume_reference_image, preserving 服装样式和版型 while fitting it naturally to the body and pose. Additional requirements: <user_desc>.

review_focus: original character appearance and makeup unchanged
